<!-- GENERATED by sphinxpress. Do not edit by hand. -->

<section id="commands">
<h1>Commands</h1>
<section id="sphinxpress-check">
<h2><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">sphinxpress</span> <span class="pre">check</span></code></h2>
<p>Loads configuration, prepares the managed environment if enabled, verifies <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">sphinx-build</span></code>, and runs Sphinx dummy builds.</p>
</section>
<section id="sphinxpress-list">
<h2><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">sphinxpress</span> <span class="pre">list</span></code></h2>
<p>Lists configured projects and resolved release metadata.</p>
</section>
<section id="sphinxpress-build-site">
<h2><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">sphinxpress</span> <span class="pre">build-site</span></code></h2>
<p>Builds Jekyll pages and navigation data.</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>sphinxpress<span class="w"> </span>build-site<span class="w"> </span>--all
sphinxpress<span class="w"> </span>build-site<span class="w"> </span>--project<span class="w"> </span>tool-a
sphinxpress<span class="w"> </span>build-site<span class="w"> </span>--projects<span class="w"> </span>tool-a,tool-b
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="sphinxpress-build-epub">
<h2><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">sphinxpress</span> <span class="pre">build-epub</span></code></h2>
<p>Builds the combined EPUB artifact.</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>sphinxpress<span class="w"> </span>build-epub<span class="w"> </span>--all
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="sphinxpress-build-pdf">
<h2><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">sphinxpress</span> <span class="pre">build-pdf</span></code></h2>
<p>Builds the combined PDF artifact with Sphinx’s <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">latexpdf</span></code> builder. Requires LaTeX system dependencies.</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>sphinxpress<span class="w"> </span>build-pdf<span class="w"> </span>--all
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="sphinxpress-build-book">
<h2><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">sphinxpress</span> <span class="pre">build-book</span></code></h2>
<p>Format-dispatching wrapper around PDF and EPUB builds.</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>sphinxpress<span class="w"> </span>build-book<span class="w"> </span>--format<span class="w"> </span>epub<span class="w"> </span>--all
sphinxpress<span class="w"> </span>build-book<span class="w"> </span>--format<span class="w"> </span>pdf<span class="w"> </span>--all
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="sphinxpress-update-release">
<h2><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">sphinxpress</span> <span class="pre">update-release</span></code></h2>
<p>Updates one project’s stored <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">release_tag</span></code>.</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>sphinxpress<span class="w"> </span>update-release<span class="w"> </span>--project<span class="w"> </span>tool-a<span class="w"> </span>--tag<span class="w"> </span>v0.1.0
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="sphinxpress-update-releases">
<h2><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">sphinxpress</span> <span class="pre">update-releases</span></code></h2>
<p>Resolves and updates release tags for all configured projects.</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>sphinxpress<span class="w"> </span>update-releases<span class="w"> </span>--all
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="sphinxpress-add-project">
<h2><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">sphinxpress</span> <span class="pre">add-project</span></code></h2>
<p>Appends a new <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[[projects]]</span></code> entry to <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">sphinxpress.toml</span></code>.</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>sphinxpress<span class="w"> </span>add-project<span class="w"> </span><span class="se">\</span>
<span class="w">  </span>--name<span class="w"> </span>tool-a<span class="w"> </span><span class="se">\</span>
<span class="w">  </span>--docs<span class="w"> </span>../tool-a/docs<span class="w"> </span><span class="se">\</span>
<span class="w">  </span>--repo<span class="w"> </span>https://github.com/example/tool-a
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="sphinxpress-validate">
<h2><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">sphinxpress</span> <span class="pre">validate</span></code></h2>
<p>Runs checks, validates generated Jekyll output, and verifies aggregate book project creation.</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>sphinxpress<span class="w"> </span>validate
sphinxpress<span class="w"> </span>validate<span class="w"> </span>--linkcheck
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
